text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, May 24. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing scripts to process image datasets. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Writing scripts to process image datasets. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
